creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
After the update of the new nvidia driver Xorg does not display anything. It looks like it keeps hanging but running top in another ttyv shows that xorg and windowmanager are actually running. So everything looks fine, except for the fact that Xorg and windowmanager are not getting displayed.

I created another xorg.conf with nvidia-xconfig but with no effect. The log files are not showing any errors. A portupgrade -Rf nvidia-driver had no effect either.
